mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.target_type AS targetType, r.reason_type AS reasonType, r.description, r.status, r.create_time AS createTime, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, reporter.nick_name AS reporterNickName, reporter.avatar_url AS reporterAvatarUrl, r.target_id AS targetId
p.title AS productTitle, p.images AS productCoverImageJson, p.user_id AS productUserId, seller.nick_name AS productUserNickName,
target_user.nick_name AS targetUserNickName, target_user.avatar_url AS targetUserAvatarUrl,
FROM report r LEFT JOIN user reporter ON r.reporter_id = reporter.id
LEFT JOIN product p ON r.target_id = p.id AND r.target_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user seller ON p.user_id = seller.id
LEFT JOIN user target_user ON r.target_id = target_user.id AND r.target_type = 2
WHERE 1=1
AND r.status = #{status}
AND r.target_type = #{targetType}
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.target_type AS targetType, r.reason_type AS reasonType, r.description, r.evidence AS evidenceJson, r.status, r.handle_result AS handleResult, r.handle_time AS handleTime, r.create_time AS createTime, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, reporter.nick_name AS reporterNickName, reporter.avatar_url AS reporterAvatarUrl, reporter.phone AS reporterPhone, r.target_id AS targetId, p.title AS productTitle, p.description AS productDescription, p.price AS productPrice, p.images AS productImagesJson, p.status AS productStatus, p.user_id AS productUserId, seller.nick_name AS productUserNickName, seller.phone AS productUserPhone, target_user.nick_name AS targetUserNickName, target_user.avatar_url AS targetUserAvatarUrl, target_user.phone AS targetUserPhone, target_user.status AS targetUserStatus, target_user.auth_status AS targetUserAuthStatus, r.handler_id AS handlerId, handler.username AS handlerName FROM report r LEFT JOIN user reporter ON r.reporter_id = reporter.id LEFT JOIN product p ON r.target_id = p.id AND r.target_type = 1 LEFT JOIN user seller ON p.user_id = seller.id LEFT JOIN user target_user ON r.target_id = target_user.id AND r.target_type = 2 LEFT JOIN employee handler ON r.handler_id = handler.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
